spec_match.rationale: Fakes the iframe behavior using normal styled divs and JS height manipulation instead of testing real iframes and the native browser responsive sizing API.

interactive.rationale: Interactive accordion controls and height resize animation, but it operates on mocked divs and manual JS instead of the actual API.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The FAQ accordion use case is well described.

edge_cases.rationale: Does not test real iframe sizing constraints or API availability.

references.rationale: Violates repository hard rule: does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5108373464547328.

design_system.rationale: Aligns with showcase design system styles.

openQuestions.title: Re-implement Accordion Embed using a real iframe and Deno route
openQuestions.detail: The page fakes the iframe behavior using a styled div and manual JS height styling. It must be refactored to embed a real child document containing the accordion inside an <iframe> with the allow-responsive-sizing attribute, and the Deno server must serve the child document with Supports-Responsive-Sizing: 1.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus link (hard rule violation)
openQuestions.detail: The page does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5108373464547328, which violates the repository hard rule that every concept page must include a ChromeStatus link.
